# Support

## Getting Help

- **Bug reports**: Use the [bug report template](https://github.com/SysAdminDoc/LibreSpot/issues/new?template=bug-report.yml).
- **Compatibility issues**: Use the [compatibility template](https://github.com/SysAdminDoc/LibreSpot/issues/new?template=compatibility.yml).
- **Feature requests**: Use the [feature request template](https://github.com/SysAdminDoc/LibreSpot/issues/new?template=feature-request.yml).
- **Security vulnerabilities**: Use [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/SysAdminDoc/LibreSpot/security/advisories/new).

## Scope

LibreSpot is a Spotify customization installer for Windows. We can help with:

- LibreSpot installation, configuration, and maintenance
- Compatibility between Spotify versions and SpotX/Spicetify
- Theme and extension selection through the LibreSpot catalog
- Auto-reapply watcher behavior

We **cannot** help with:

- General Spotify account or playback issues
- SpotX or Spicetify bugs unrelated to LibreSpot's integration
- Spotify on macOS, Linux, iOS, or Android
- Third-party clients (Spotube, Psst, Ncspot)

For upstream issues, file them directly with [SpotX](https://github.com/SpotX-Official/SpotX/issues) or [Spicetify](https://github.com/spicetify/cli/issues).
